description: A single placed thing entry inside a PrefabDef. The containing element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'def' field).

def.label: Thing
def.description: ThingDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader; not a nested child element in standard PrefabDef XML.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: Material (ThingDef) used to construct the thing when it is a stuffable building or item.

colorDef.label: Color def
colorDef.description: Named color (ColorDef) applied to this thing instance.

color.label: Color
color.description: Direct Unity Color override as '(r, g, b, a)'. Prefer colorDef for named colors.

stackCountRange.label: Stack count range
stackCountRange.description: Range for how many items appear in the stack. Defaults to 1~1.

hp.label: HP
hp.description: Hit points of the placed thing. Omit to use the ThingDef default max HP.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability this entry is placed (0-1). Defaults to 1.

canOverrideData.label: Can override data
canOverrideData.description: Whether scenario-level or quest-level overrides may replace this entry. Defaults to true.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Forced quality category for the placed item. Omit or leave empty for default quality.

position.label: Position
position.description: Single-cell placement offset from the prefab origin, as '(x, y, z)'. Used when rects and positions are absent.

rects.label: Rects
rects.description: List of cell rectangles. Each <li> is a CellRect in compact '(x, z, width, height)' format.

positions.label: Positions
positions.description: List of specific cell offsets. Each <li> is an IntVec3 as '(x, y, z)'.

relativeRotation.label: Relative rotation
relativeRotation.description: Rotation offset applied to the thing relative to the prefab's own rotation.
